chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos. 741 & 742 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No. 4231/22. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For order on CMA No. 4232/22. 06.11.2025 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate for applicant. This reference application is pending since 2022 without any progress. On 30.08.2024 following order was passed:- “30.08.2024. Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, Advocate for Applicant. Counsel is directed to rephrase the questions of law as they are more argumentative in nature.” On 12.12.2024, the following order was passed:- “12.12.2024. Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, Advocate for the Applicant and requests for adjournment as he is not available. Record reflects that he has not complied with the order passed on 30.08.2024, therefore, as a last and final chance time is allowed. If compliance is not made, Reference Application would be deemed to be dismissed without further indulgence. Office to place a copy of this order in the connected matter listed above.” Today, learned counsel merely seeks time, whereas the orders are not complied with. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these references are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969.

Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these references are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected file. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
